title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Walker Chandiok - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Walker Chandiok - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Walker Chandiok is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!
